MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Aug-06-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: CURTIS KARNOW; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(415-609-2485) Jose Javier Gutierrez interested party

Hearing is held. Jose stated that he gave notice that he would contest to the tenative today, the he is not a named defendant in the case and that he loaned money to the plaintiff. The Court stated that the only item on calendar for today is regarding the notice of complaint.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALI POORSINA Notice Of Complaint is OFF CALENDAR per moving party's request. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
